item.name: Xd'aa Talat Cichlid
item.description:
A charming freshwater fish that inhabits the still depths of Xd'aa Talat Tsoly.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: According to Xbr'aal legend, this cichlid─native to Yak T'el─is favored by the spirit of the tsolys, who bestowed the wavekin with their enchanting coloration and graceful demeanor.
